feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: angels wouldn't help you.
entry.summary:
Author: dylaesthetics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,722Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 50

Summary: Buck thought he knew what rock bottom felt like already. Between a lightning strike, a belated dead brother acquisition, a thirty-thousand pound vehicle crushing his leg, and a goddamn tsunami, he figured he’s experienced all life has to offer.Turns out, he’d been achingly wrong.Because here he is, lonely and left behind, at three in the morning and four beers down, purchasing a ticket to a queer speed-dating event. Not just any regular ticket. No. A whole weekend getaway, the premium pack with a fancy restaurant booking and SPA included.This. This is rock bottom.______OR in the wake of Eddie moving to El Paso, the Fallen Angel of Coquette curses Buck, forcing him to revisit memories from his past.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Soul of Water
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 242,715Chapters: 29/31Kudos: 231

Summary: Buck made a friend as a child that would stay with him from that day on. That friend just so happened to be a spirited little water elemental. A promise has kept their bond a secret his entire life, but now that Buck is older, and a very perceptive Eddie Diaz has entered the picture, keeping his secret might not be as easy, or necessary, as he thought. Follow Buck as he learns more about his bond and abilities, all while dragging an unaware Eddie and Chris along for the ride.

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,808Chapters: 5/365Kudos: 16

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: i’ll find you (in this lifetime and every one after)
entry.summary:
Author: decodediaz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,145Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 64

Summary: “You- You found me.” Eddie looks up from his crossword. He’s never seen Buck look so… small, except from when he was in that hospital bed, refusing to look at Eddie. He tries to push the image out of his head. “I did.” Eddie says simply, because of course he did. He’ll always find Buck, just like Buck always finds him.   or   in which buck never tells chim. he spirals out of control, until he does something he can never take back.

entry.title: kiss me hard before you go
entry.summary:
Author: kryptonian

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,846Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 51

Summary: “Depends,” Eddie says after a short beat. Eager as ever, Buck pushes to his elbows. “On?” Fingers skate over the inside of his thigh, teasing, light. “On if you can get it up more than once.” Without blinking, Buck answers, “I can come six times in a night.” Eddie chokes on his own spit, fingers tightening over his thigh. “Sorry— six?” Cheeks pink with pride, Buck grins. “Why? You one and done these days, old man?” “You call me old man again…” Eddie begins, wrapping his fingers around Buck’s cock and stroking it with a loose fist, base to tip. “...And I’m kicking you outta my truck and going back to drinks with your subordinates, Buck.” Panic flares. Buck’s hand snaps out, jeopardising his balance. His fingers find Eddie’s forearm, gripping tight enough that his nails will leave marks on the inside of Eddie’s arm. “Don’t.”OR: A non HR approved after-work event

entry.title: Unexpected visitors
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,207Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 255

Summary: “Well one of her old friends still lives in Hershey and you know, they talked and Maddie mentioned the pregnancy-““Still perfectly normal.”“And her friend ran into your parents at the store and told them about the pregnancy.”Buck froze.“And I mean you know, you know Maddie hasn’t spoken to them since she found out about… you know.”“The Jakeman thing.”“Yeah, yeah the Jakeman thing. She blocked their number. And even before that she didn’t ever talk to them about you really I mean- she never even told them about Rina or your leg or anything she- she’s totally been respecting your right to not want them in your life-““Chim. What exactly happened this morning?”“They must have used a new number to try and call Maddie because they got through.”“… Okay. Okay so my parents called. That’s… not great but-““They called to tell us that they’re in LA.”“They-“ Buck blinked once. Twice.He swallowed hard.“They’re in LA?” ...In which the Buckley parents come to town. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: Buprenorphine and Pink Brandywines
entry.summary:
Author: pyrolysis (bertrandsbakingchannel)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,783Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 87

Summary: Eddie Diaz doesn’t remember most of his life going by. Buck’s been talking about it lately (when he actually talks to Eddie about things that matters), about how fast they’re getting older. Eddie isn’t sure he’s ready to be satisfied with what he’s done with life. Eddie isn’t sure he’s done everything he wants to yet, but maybe he should try to.   Eddie trying to do things that make him happy, but he sucks at it. Or, how Eddie Diaz mistakes chest pain for happiness.

entry.title: Sometimes They Forgive Them
entry.summary:
Author: RubyCaspar

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,706Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 180

Summary: “Yes, he has food poisoning,” his mom said. “He was sent home after being sick, and he has a stomach ache.”  Eddie’s head spun. “Sent home? But the school didn’t…” He shook his head, realising exactly what had happened with the school. He’d deal with it later. “Why didn’t you call me?”  His mother spread her hands. “You were working, Eddie, we know how important days like today are for you,” she said.  It was incredible how she could sound perfectly reasonable and yet so very patronising at the same time.  ___ While in Texas Chris develops appendicitis, and Eddie gets him to the hospital eight hours later than he could have because his parents decided, once again, that they knew what was best.

entry.title: no edge no glory
entry.summary:
Author: sapphicsparrows

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,363Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Buck stays standing and makes no effort to leave his spot. “Do you really think you deserve to be touched after that?”  Uh, yeah? “No,” he says as if he's reading Eddie's thoughts. Buck suddenly becoming telepathic would be useful. “You didn't turn around when I told you to.”  Buck brushes past him as he retrieves the spray bottle and cloth before dropping them on Eddie's lap. “You're going to finish off the polishing and then we'll see what you actually deserve. Okay?”  “Okay.”

entry.title: Life's Silver Linings
entry.summary:
Author: kmj07

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,270Chapters: 10/18Kudos: 14

Summary: His recovery from being struck by lightning finally over, Buck is approved to go back to work, but light duty only. Rather than spend a month as the man behind on every shift for a month, Bobby finds an alternative for him: a month doing demonstrations at schools throughout the LA area. So of course, Buck jumps at the opportunity. Little does he know, this one decision is going to change everything. Canon compliant up to season 7, then some things in season 7 still happen, but maybe at different sequences than canon. Absolutely not compliant with 8 or 9.

entry.title: Operation: Get Over Buck
entry.summary:
Author: Widowsfaith

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,964Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 75

Summary: Eddie realizes three things in El Paso: he would do anything for his son, he’s gay, and he’s hopelessly in love with his best friend.Telling Buck feels impossible.So naturally, Eddie does the only logical thing—he goes to a gay bar to try and get over him.It’s a horrible idea.

entry.title: and we kept everything professional but something’s changed (it’s something i like)
entry.summary:
Author: wotcherremus

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,081Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 55

Summary: "Listen," Eddie begins, voice hoarse. He tries not to choke. "Don't make me write you up for insubordination as well." Buck drops to his knees, still visible over the desk as he purrs, "Look at you using big words. It's hot." "Evan," Eddie warns, shuffling in his seat. It's actually quite uncomfortable, he doesn't know how Chimney lounges in it so easily. Buck doesn't listen though, ducking down underneath the desk before reappearing in between Eddie's legs. Or; Buck is a little devious and likes to wear crop tops. Eddie is interim Captain and willing to risk his job.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 220,137Chapters: 45/?Kudos: 106

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: *Stars cannot be counted*
entry.summary:
Author: Romanancy7280

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,741Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 9

Summary: Buck always believed that luck could be saved up.Until it wasn’t enough anymore. After a loss that leaves him broken and unsure how to go on, Buck withdraws from everything… including himself. He stops eating, sleeping, and talking. He shuts down. But he isn’t as alone as he thinks. Eddie isn’t leaving.Maddie won’t let go.118 is waiting. Between relapses, guilt, and small steps forward, Buck will have to learn to stay—and to let someone else hold him when he can no longer hold himself.
